{{Quote|Having trouble replacing parts on your old Z-95 or Star Duster? We have more parts for more models, new and old, than any other parts dealer in the galaxy. Call us. We got what you need.|JR Yakar's e-mail advertisement|<ref name="Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance">''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''</ref>}}
'''Yakar's Parts''' was a [[Starship/Legends|starship]] parts company selling "New & Used Transport Parts". The company's president was [[JR Yakar]]. The company offered parts for vessels such as [[Z-95 Headhunter/Legends|Z-95 Headhunters]] and [[Star Duster]]s.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''
